title: Thaumic Recipe Tweaker
description: Create your very own recipes from a editor and see them in game! (EXPERIMENTAL)
body:
THIS PROJECT IS EXPERIMENTAL AND WILL NOT RECIVE ANY MORE UPDATES FOR THE TIME BEING

Do not DM me with problems. I will not fix them.


## Features:

This mod will LOAD the recipes created in the [Thaumic Recipe Tweaker UI](https://modrinth.com/mod/thaumic-recipe-tweaker-ui/). This allows you to create any recipe you want and import loaded recipes with ease. (This project is buggy and may not load recipes correctly) This mod will try to overwrite existing recipes when you create a recipe. This is not guaranteed. This mod will load all the items, aspects, recipes, and researches from other mods, so add as many mods as you would like.


The thaumicrecipe folder, where all the important files are stored, is located in the config folder of the Minecraft instance.


## Requirements: 

- Thaumcraft
- [Thaumic Recipe Tweaker UI](https://modrinth.com/mod/thaumic-recipe-tweaker-ui/) - If you want to edit/add recipes
